REQ-MSG-001.description: A Message must carry Topic, Payload, QoS, Retained flag, and PacketID.

REQ-MSG-002.description: QoS levels AtMostOnce(0), AtLeastOnce(1), ExactlyOnce(2) must be defined and distinct.

REQ-MSG-003.description: Message must carry MQTT v5 properties: ResponseTopic, CorrelationData, UserProperties, ContentType, ExpiryInterval.

REQ-CLIENT-001.description: Client.Publish must return ErrTopicEmpty when topic is empty string.

REQ-CLIENT-002.description: Client.Subscribe must return ErrTopicEmpty when topic filter is empty string.

REQ-CLIENT-003.description: Client.Close must be idempotent: multiple calls must not panic or return unexpected errors.

REQ-PUB-001.description: Publish must reject QoS ExactlyOnce with ErrQoSUnsupported until QoS-2 is implemented.

REQ-PUB-002.description: Publish must return ErrClosed when called on a closed Client.

REQ-SUB-001.description: Subscribe must route messages to all matching topic-filter subscriptions.

REQ-SUB-002.description: MatchTopic must implement MQTT §4.7 wildcard semantics: '+' single-level, '#' multi-level.

REQ-SUB-003.description: MatchTopic must not match '$SYS' or other '$'-prefixed topics with bare '#' or leading '+'.

REQ-SUB-006.description: Subscription channel depth must be configurable; default must be at least 64.

REQ-MOCK-001.description: Mock broker must deliver retained messages to new subscribers immediately on Subscribe.

REQ-V5-CLIENT-001.description: v5.Dial must perform an MQTT 5.0 CONNECT/CONNACK handshake before returning.

REQ-V5-CLIENT-002.description: v5.Dial must return an error if the broker sends a non-zero CONNACK reason code.

REQ-V5-CLIENT-003.description: v5 Client must parse CONNACK properties and apply negotiated TopicAliasMax and ServerKeepalive.

REQ-V5-PUB-001.description: PublishV5 must encode User Properties in the PUBLISH packet properties section.

REQ-V5-PUB-002.description: PublishV5 must encode ResponseTopic and CorrelationData in the PUBLISH packet properties.

REQ-V5-PUB-003.description: PublishV5 must encode Message Expiry Interval in the PUBLISH packet properties when non-zero.

REQ-V5-SUB-001.description: SubscribeV5 must encode subscription options (QoS, NoLocal, RetainAsPublished, RetainHandling) in the SUBSCRIBE packet.

REQ-V5-SUB-002.description: When NoLocal=true, the broker must not deliver a client's own publishes back to it.

REQ-V5-SUB-003.description: When RetainAsPublished=true, the RETAIN flag in delivered messages must reflect the publisher's setting.

REQ-V5-ALIAS-001.description: v5 Client must resolve incoming topic aliases per MQTT v5 §3.3.2.3.4: register alias on first use (non-empty topic), resolve on subsequent use (empty topic).

REQ-V5-SESSION-001.description: v5.WithSessionExpiry must encode a Session Expiry Interval in the CONNECT properties.
